response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering with a strong background in TypeScript, JavaScript, and other languages, but his resume does not explicitly highlight AI/GenAI-specific experience, vector databases, or RAG architectures—key requirements for this role. His recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators is promising but lacks depth in AI-driven solutions or cloud platforms. Leadership and technical discovery skills are implied but not clearly demonstrated in the context of GenAI.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with experience in TypeScript, Python, and other languages
Recent involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Proven ability to lead technical projects and mentor teams, as seen in his consulting and open-source work
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks in prior roles
Lack of clear experience with major cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) in the context of AI/GenAI
Resume does not emphasize AI-driven solutions or production-grade GenAI system development
